ActionPrediction.title: ActionPrediction
ActionPrediction.description: Action-first artifact: the action chunk, plus an optional WAM rollout + telemetry.

ActionPredictionRequest.title: ActionPredictionRequest
ActionPredictionRequest.description: `POST /v1/action-predictions` — primary output is an executable action chunk.

RolloutPrediction.title: RolloutPrediction
RolloutPrediction.description: Rollout-first artifact: the predicted future, plus optional states/actions + telemetry.

RolloutPredictionRequest.title: RolloutPredictionRequest
RolloutPredictionRequest.description: `POST /v1/rollout-predictions` — primary output is a predicted/imagined future.
